title: Niceas Modpack
body:
# Welcome to the Niceas Modpack!

This mod pack was originally put together by Niceas for you and your friends to improve and optimize your Minecraft experience. It offers a variety of improvements and customizations to ensure you can enjoy a stable and smooth gaming experience without losing the original vanilla feel of Minecraft. From FPS improvements to bug fixes and additional features, this mod pack is designed to make your time in Minecraft even more enjoyable.

## Features:

1. FPS improvements: Optimizations and performance improvements will make your game run smoother and offer a higher frame rate, even in demanding situations.
2. Bug fixes and stability improvements: Niceas Modpack fixes a variety of bugs and errors that can occur in the vanilla version of Minecraft, providing a more stable gaming experience overall.
3. Additional setting options: Niceas Modpack gives you access to a variety of additional setting options that allow you to customize your game according to your preferences.

## Tests
on my pc 130+ fps on 89 chunks

**PC Specs:**
- Graphics card: GTX 1650 SUPER
- CPU: Intel i5-10400F
- Ram: 32GB
